scripts.dev: concurrently -c auto -n gateway,identity,auth,payment,settlement "npx nx serve api-gateway" "npx nx serve identity-service" "npx nx serve auth-service" "npx nx serve payment-service" "npx nx serve settlement-service"

scripts.dev:core: concurrently -c auto -n gateway,identity,auth,payment,settlement,accounting,audit "npx nx serve api-gateway" "npx nx serve identity-service" "npx nx serve auth-service" "npx nx serve payment-service" "npx nx serve settlement-service" "npx nx serve accounting-service" "npx nx serve audit-log-service"
